description: After the bootcamper confirms readiness, the transition turn produces a full module start (banner + journey map + before/after + first step), not a bare acknowledgment. Exercises the Module Transition Protocol minimum-content requirement.

turns.content:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MODULE 2: SDK Setup
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

| Module | Name | Status |
|--------|------|--------|
| 1 | Business Problem | done |
| 2 | SDK Setup | in progress |

Before: you have a documented problem but no working SDK. After: the Senzing SDK is installed and verified in your chosen language.

Step 1 — Detect existing SDK. I'll start by checking whether the Senzing SDK is already installed so we don't reinstall it.
